Name: Zoning, Monitor Point, Brooklyn (C 260105 ZMK).
Title: Application number C 260105 ZMK (Monitor Point) submitted by GoQuay LLC and the NYS Metropolitan Transportation Authority, pursuant to Sections 197-c and 201 of the New York City Charter for an amendment of the Zoning Map, Section No. 12c: changing from an M3-1 District to an R6 District; changing from an R6 District to an R8 District; changing from an M3-1 District to an R8 District; and establishing within a portion of the proposed R8 District a C2-4 District, Borough of Brooklyn, Community District 1, Council District 33.

History.Description: This Land Use Application was Introduced by Council
